attempt: Transfer TICKET61's stricter rule: a separator that is discovered after replay is not a proof coordinate. Replace it with a pre-observable symbolic coordinate, or promote the failure to a counterexample search target.

bounded_result.symbolic_gate: margin separator keys must be computable before evaluating the exceptional even packet
bounded_result.candidate_theorem: Every mixed Goldbach margin cylinder has a pre-replay character/error coordinate with a closed cutoff transition law, or yields a cutoff-stable exceptional even packet.
bounded_result.counterexample_target: a residue/cutoff cylinder whose positive-margin ambiguity survives all pre-replay character keys
bounded_result.frontier_rule: A finite separator is useful only when its key is available before replay and has a symbolic transition law. Otherwise it remains a diagnostic coordinate, not a proof bridge.

obstruction: This is a proof-discipline transfer and does not solve the target problem. It upgrades the next experiment from diagnostic separation to symbolic transition closure.
candidate_theorem: Every mixed Goldbach margin cylinder has a pre-replay character/error coordinate with a closed cutoff transition law, or yields a cutoff-stable exceptional even packet.
next_experiment: Build the problem-specific pre-replay separator table and test symbolic transition closure.
claim_boundary: No goldbach proof and no certified goldbach counterexample.
